title: Traffic is trickling through Strait of Hormuz: Who's moving through and who's still stranded or diverting
summary_full: Iran has scared off most ships from the Strait of Hormuz, leaving some ships to pass through, while most continued to wait outside the Gulf.
summary_public: Iran has scared off most ships from the Strait of Hormuz, leaving some ships to pass through, while most continued to wait outside the Gulf.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has scared off most ships from the Strait of Hormuz
